violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 04/20/2026

Dishes, utensils and limes were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Handsink cleared during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2026
The dumpster has accumulation of trash and debris and is in need of being emptied. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 04/20/2026
The floor in the bar area has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2026
